description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/latex-template/docker and a single build stage. Add a build job in the build stage that runs latexmk -synctex=1 -interaction=batchmode -halt-on-error -file-line-error -pdf document, uploads document.pdf, document.log and document.synctex.gz as artifacts that expire after one week, and runs on all branches except tags. Add a build_chapter job in the same stage that changes to the sections directory, executes find . -name '*.tex' -exec latexmk -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -pdf {} \; , stores all sections/*.pdf files as artifacts expiring after one week, and also runs only on non‑tag pipelines. Add a build_release job in the build stage that runs the same latexmk command as the build job, stores the same artifacts without expiration, and runs only when a tag is pushed.
